response.justification: The candidate lacks the required 8 years of C++ experience and 5 years of large-scale infrastructure/cloud compute platform experience; their work is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, with only brief C++ exposure in academic or minor roles, and no evidence of leading cloud compute platforms or mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers as required.
strengths: Strong full-stack and cross-platform development experience across web, mobile, and embedded systems
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops and talks
Demonstrated ability to build and deploy distributed systems (e.g., Kubernetes, CI/CD pipelines)
concerns: Only minimal C++ experience documented — far below the 8-year minimum requirement
No evidence of leadership in cloud compute platforms, distributed systems, or hardware architecture
Lacks documented experience in technical leadership roles mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
